metaData.Ingredients: Rice Vinegar, Selected Black Glutinous Rice, Ginger, Orange Skin, Red Dates, Caramel and Sugar
metaData.Key Information:
Black Sweet Rice Vinegar is a dark coloured seasoning with a rich umami taste with a hint of sweetness. It is made with glutinous or sweet rice.Health benefits:
• Amino acids & other nutrients: Fight the effects of build-up lactic acid and prevents fatigue
• Rich & Warm: Ensures proper blood circulation in your body
• Acetic acid: Lowers cholesterol
metaData.Preparation: Use it when marinating your favourite meat products
